geometry_mapping_identity_digest.stability_expectation: stable across non-identity geometry context changes

geometry_context_input_digest.stability_expectation: changes whenever supplied geometry context changes

legacy_alias.compatibility_policy: retain during migration window; typed fields are authoritative

governance_rules.typed_divergence_policy: geometry_mapping_identity_digest != geometry_context_input_digest is expected when full context contains non-identity fields
governance_rules.misuse_condition: fail only when alias target mismatches or when a workflow compares mismatched digest types as if equivalent
cross_stack_checks: mapping identity digest consistency for identity equivalence
context input digest consistency for detector input provenance

lineage_relationships.detector_input_fidelity: geometry_context_input_digest represents detector input payload exactly
